title: Cloud Save Manager
description: A mod for managing and syncing Minecraft world saves with the Choculaterie cloud storage
body:
# Cloud Save Manager Mod for Minecraft

**Cloud Save Manager** is an extension for Minecraft that lets you **sync, back up, and restore your world saves** directly to [choculaterie.com](https://choculaterie.com) all without ever leaving the game

Keep your worlds safe and accessible with just a few clicks. No more manual file transfers or lost saves. Everything is automagically managed in the cloud and fully integrated into your Minecraft client!
 
> [Join our Discord Community](https://discord.choculaterie.com)  
> [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Choculaterie/SaveManager) <- Starring it helps me a lot <3

---

## Features

- **Cloud World Sync**  
  Upload and sync your Minecraft worlds to [choculaterie.com](https://choculaterie.com) for safe, secure cloud storage

- **In-Game Save Manager**  
  Browse, delete, and restore your saved worlds directly from within Minecraft

- **Cross-Device Access**  
  Access your worlds from any computer by logging into your Choculaterie account. Perfect for players who switch devices!

## How to Report Issues

If you run into bugs, crashes, or have suggestions for improvements:

- Open an issue on the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Choculaterie/SaveManager/issues)  
- Or join the [Discord Server](https://discord.choculaterie.com) to discuss directly with the developer and community

When reporting issues, please include:
- Your Minecraft version  
- Fabric version  
- List of installed mods  
- Any relevant crash logs or game logs
